system:

Draft a professional reply to the customer using the executed action and any system-of-record IDs. Preserve the customer's language. Cite the originating PO / quote / case number explicitly. Keep the reply under 220 words unless the case requires more.

{
  "to": "Rituraj Shrivastava <rituraj@leewayhertz.com>",
  "subject": "Re: Request to release credit hold on Order SO-LH-7733 — wire transfer cleared",
  "language": "en",
  "body": "Hi Rituraj,\n\nThank you for the update. We have your request to release the credit hold on Order SO-LH-7733.\n\nOur records show SO-LH-7733 is currently on credit hold due to the outstanding balance on invoice INV-LH-7711 (USD 88,420.00). We’ve noted your SWIFT wire transfer clearance reference: WIRE-2026-05-16-LHRT-077.\n\nWe are now completing the final credit verification and will release the hold as soon as the payment is confirmed/posted. Once released, the order will be able to proceed toward shipment.\n\nIf you have a remittance advice or SWIFT MT103, please share it to help expedite the confirmation.\n\nBest regards,\nKeysight Sales Operations",

    "invoice_number": "INV-LH-7711",
    "clearance_reference": "WIRE-2026-05-16-LHRT-077",
    "customer_code": "LEEWAY-HERTZ-001",
